Petition For Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Barrett appeared via zoom for Lita Grant (petitioner).

The Court shall take the Amended Report of Administrator and Petition for Final Distribution under submission with the intent to grant. Petition for attorney fees are ordered off calendar. The Court reminded counsel that statutory fees must be paid from the estate and should not be paid without a court order.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cece. Not reported

MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for amended report of administrator, final distribution and attorney fees.

Dept. 204; Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Bailiff: Deputy Musto; Not reported

Petitioner Lita Grant represented by James M. Barrett, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.

The Court has read the amended report, petition and related documents in this matter. Petitioner shall submit updated statements and accounting that are 100% compliant.

Court orders matter continued to Mar-03-2026 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 for status on close. Court anticipates issuing a prehearing order.
